mapper.select:
select * from DAY_WATER_USE_PLAN
and AREA = #{req.area}
and TO_CHAR(RECORD_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(#{req.recordTime},'YYYY-MM-DD')
and DEL = 0

with dayUseWater as (select 'day' useWaterPlan, a.AREA, a.UNIT_NAME unit, to_char(b.V) v, to_char(b.RECORD_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd') tm from USE_WATER_MANAGEMENT a, DAY_WATER_USE_PLAN b where to_char(b.RECORD_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd') >= to_char(#{startTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_char(b.RECORD_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd') <= to_char(#{endTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and a.P_ID = b.ID and a.DEL = 0 and a.DEL = 0 and a.USE_WATER_PLAN = '日用水计划') select * from dayUseWater where (area, unit, tm) in (select area, unit, max(tm) from dayUseWater group by area, unit)
